problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Spintronics. Spintronics for low-power data storage directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
